get.description: Returns the session user resolved from the Better Auth session cookie.
Returns 200 only if the database connection is alive.

post.description: Returns a URL the frontend should navigate to in order to start the OAuth flow. The callback will only succeed if the social account email matches the current user email.

403.description: User's email is not verified, or the user is deactivated.

409.description: A linked account for this provider already exists.

post.summary: Initiate linking a social provider to the current account

delete.description: Removes a previously linked Google or Facebook account. Fails with 422 if the unlink would leave the user with no remaining sign-in method.

404.description: No linked account for this provider.

422.description: Cannot unlink the last remaining sign-in method.

delete.summary: Unlink a social provider from the current account

get.description: Returns doctors with optional status, categoryId, search filters and pagination.

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Filter to doctors assigned to this categoryId.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Substring match on name or category name

400.description: Past-time slot, endsAt <= startsAt, or DEACTIVATED doctor/category.

post.summary: Create a slot for a doctor (admin)

409.description: Slot is BOOKED or BLOCKED — only AVAILABLE slots can be deleted.
Appointment is not in PENDING status.
Appointment is already CANCELLED or COMPLETED.
Appointment is not in CONFIRMED status.

patch.summary: Mark a CONFIRMED appointment as completed (admin)

get.description: Paginated list of all appointments, filterable by status, userId, doctorId.
Anonymous-accessible list of AVAILABLE slots for an ACTIVE doctor in an ACTIVE category, sorted ascending by start time.

404.description: Doctor not found, is DEACTIVATED, or is in a DEACTIVATED category.

get.summary: List AVAILABLE slots for a doctor (public)

201.description: Appointment created in PENDING. Slot is now BOOKED.

400.description: Past-time slot, DEACTIVATED doctor or category.

200.description: Paginated list of the patient's appointments.

404.description: Appointment does not exist or belongs to a different patient.

409.description: Appointment is already CANCELLED or COMPLETED.

get.description: Anonymous-accessible listing of doctors. Optional filters: categoryId (FK equality, requires the category to be ACTIVE) and search (case-insensitive substring on name + category.name). Pagination via page (default 1) and pageSize (default 20, max 100).

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Filter to doctors in this category (and only ACTIVE categories).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring match on doctor name OR category name.

get.description: Returns the full public record of a single ACTIVE doctor whose category is also ACTIVE. Returns 404 otherwise.
Returns categories with optional status + search filters and pagination. Admin-only.

409.description: A category with this name already exists.
Name collision with another ACTIVE category.
Category is in use by one or more doctors.

get.description: Anonymous-accessible list of active categories used to populate the doctor search dropdown. Sorted alphabetically (case-insensitive).
Returns the services attached to a single doctor with optional status filter and pagination. Admin-only.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by service status. Defaults to all statuses.

400.description: Validation error (e.g. discount without price, or no fields).

post.summary: Create a service for a doctor (admin)

get.summary: Get a single service for a doctor (admin)

400.description: No fields to update, or discount/price inconsistency.

404.description: Appointment does not exist or belongs to a different patient.

409.description: Appointment is not COMPLETED, or a review already exists for it.

post.summary: Leave a review for a completed appointment

get.description: Paginated list of reviews for a doctor, sorted newest-first, with the aggregate averageRating inlined.
Paginated list of all reviews. Optional filters: doctorId, userId.
Paginated list of the caller’s notifications, newest first. Optional unreadOnly filter. Includes unreadCount for unread-badge UI.

parameters.name: unreadOnly
parameters.description: Filter to unread only (readAt is null).

404.description: Notification does not exist or belongs to another user.

patch.summary: Mark a notification as read or unread

409.description: Appointment is not COMPLETED, or a medical record already exists for it.

post.summary: Create a medical record for a COMPLETED appointment (admin)

404.description: Medical record does not exist or caller is not authorised to view it.

get.summary: Read the medical record for an appointment

get.description: Paginated list of all medical records owned by the caller, newest first.
get.summary: List the caller's full medical history across doctors

info.title: Vezeeta Backend API
info.description:
REST API for the Vezeeta backend.

## Auth

Auth is handled by [Better Auth](https://www.better-auth.com/) and exposed under `/api/auth/*`.
After `sign-in/email` or `sign-in/phone-number`, the server sets an HTTP-only session cookie.
The frontend must send the cookie on every subsequent request (use `credentials: "include"` in fetch / `withCredentials: true` in axios).

For the social OAuth flow, the browser hits `GET /api/auth/oauth/start?provider=google` (or `facebook`) — a Better Auth standard route — and follows the 302 redirect.

Use the **Authorize** button below to paste the session cookie value if you want to call protected endpoints from Swagger UI.

## Tags

- `auth` — current-session, social linking, health
- `doctors` — public doctor catalog
- `categories` — public category dropdown
- `slots` — public slot picker for a doctor
- `doctor-services` — per-doctor service catalog (admin)
- `appointments` — patient booking flow
- `reviews` — patient reviews + public doctor rating
- `medical-records` — patient-facing read of their records
- `notifications` — in-app inbox
- `admin` — admin-only management (requires the `admin` role)

tags.name: auth
tags.description: Session and account endpoints exposed by the app.

tags.name: slots
tags.description: Public slot picker for a doctor.

tags.name: reviews
tags.description: Patient reviews and public doctor rating.

tags.name: medical-records
tags.description: Patient read of their own medical records.

cookie.name: vezeta.session_token
cookie.description: Better Auth session cookie set by /api/auth/* (prefix configured in src/auth/auth.ts).

provider.description: Social provider to link to the current account.

callbackURL.description: Same-origin frontend route to return to after the link completes. Must be a relative path starting with `/` (no scheme, no host, no `//`).

categoryId.description: Id of the ACTIVE category this doctor belongs to.

imageUrl.description: Profile photo URL. Must be a valid https:// URL.

categoryId.description: Id of an ACTIVE category to reassign the doctor to.

startsAt.description: Slot start time (UTC, ISO 8601). Must be in the future.

endsAt.description: Slot end time (UTC, ISO 8601). Must be strictly after startsAt (service-layer check).

status.description: New slot status. BOOKED is NOT settable via this endpoint — booking manages that lifecycle.

slotId.description: Id of an AVAILABLE slot for an ACTIVE doctor in an ACTIVE category.

name.description: Category display name. Trimmed of leading/trailing whitespace.

status.description: Category status. Defaults to ACTIVE when omitted.

name.description: New category name. Trimmed of leading/trailing whitespace.
Service display name (free-text, e.g. "Consultation", "ECG"). Trimmed of leading/trailing whitespace.

price.description: Service price (no currency). Omit for free / price-on-request services. Must be non-negative and at most 99999999.99.

discountPercent.description: Discount as a percentage 0-100. Only meaningful when a price is also set; rejected with 400 if supplied without a price.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Defaults to ACTIVE when omitted.

name.description: New service display name. Trimmed of leading/trailing whitespace.

price.description: New service price (no currency). Omit to clear; supply a number to set. Must be non-negative and at most 99999999.99.

discountPercent.description: New discount as a percentage 0-100. Omit to clear; supply a number to set. Requires a price to be set either in this PATCH body or already on the service (enforced in the service layer).

attachmentUrls.description: Public URLs to attachments (e.g. lab results, prescriptions). Must be valid https:// URLs. Max 25.
Replacement attachment URL list (max 25). Must be valid https:// URLs.
